name: Diabetic Popcorn Snacks
recipeInstructions:
1. For a TV snack or something to take to the game, prepare popcorn without fat using your popper's instructions.
2. Season to taste with one of the following options:
- Butter-flavored salt
- Taco seasoning
- Garlic salt
- Onion salt
- Parmesan cheese
- Dried herbs
- Hickory-flavored salt (Great outdoors)
- Seasoned salt
3. Optionally, share leftover popcorn with birds by stringing it up outside for a healthy treat.
4. In winter, consider rubbing bacon fat on the corn before serving to provide extra flavor and warmth.
